positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a soaring, mythical griffin perched atop a geometrically patterned mountain peak. The griffin is composed of sharp, elegant lines, blending lion and eagle features, rendered in obsidian black and deep sapphire blue. The background consists of abstract, tessellated mountain ranges and swirling cosmic nebulae, using only metallic silver and gold accents. The composition is highly centralized and symmetrical, emphasizing strong verticality and clean silhouettes. Style: Modern geometric illustration, neo-Art Deco meets stylized linework. Lighting: High contrast, dramatic sidelight creating deep shadows and luminous highlights. Perfect for apparel print, vector art quality, isolated subject on white background (for easy cutout).
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, logos, low detail, noisy, bad anatomy, multiple subjects, messy, grain
